content.answer:
Hi Shuning,

As aligned with Alice and C&B, we would like to kindly seek your approval
for below. Based on the below proposal, it is considered as Normal Offer:
1. Package pay position is *P25 to P50*

   - We would like to propose *S$7,200 - S$7,500 month, but will start the
   offer at the lower end*. As aligned with Emily, this is within the
   Senior Associate range for Cross Border
   - Candidate has received A ratings in all rounds, including final
   interviewer.
   - Based on interview and case performance, she has received strong
   feedback including relevant project experiences, familiarity on working
   with senior management in her past 2 roles
   - Our proposed offer is a 5% increment on her total compensation

*Actual offer in local currency terms:*
*Monthly Salary: *7200 - 7500 SGD
Total Yearly Package (assuming average 14 months):  100800 - 105000 SGD

inclusive of RSU value if any.

*Current Salary:*
*- Monthly basic: *6820 SGD
*- Annual bonus:* 2.5 months performance bonus based on last drawn in Jan,
Mar and  2024

annually
